The sector suffers from rigid upstream constraints, leading to higher lithium prices and a looming supply‑demand mismatch.

title: Agentic Engineering 的一些心得
content: Three months of agentic development taught the author that constraints, clear specifications, and a design‑→spec‑→plan‑→implement workflow prevent problems. Code is the agent’s best guide; avoid relying on visual JSON or HTML outputs. Use a Git repo as the primary memory and context; a .memory folder and post‑hook handle synchronization. Practice different languages, architectures, and tools; AI can teach but not replace human judgment. Keep a single authoritative documentation repo, standardize where specs, schemas, and API definitions live, and let agents call each other’s tools for coordination.

title: I Imagined Hermes Agent Running an Entire Smart City — And It Changed How I See AI
content: Hermes Agent demonstrates that AI can move beyond simple chat responses to reason, plan, and act autonomously. By integrating tools and multi‑step execution, it reshapes how developers envision applications such as Trafiq AI—a smart traffic system that could monitor congestion, reroute vehicles, and prioritize emergencies in real time. The open‑source nature of Hermes Agent democratizes access, enabling students and independent creators to build sophisticated, action‑oriented AI systems. This suggests we are entering an era where AI actively manages complex environments rather than merely conversing.

title: Neutron scattering explains why gluten-free pasta falls apart (2025)
content: Neutron scattering studies reveal that gluten‑free pasta lacks the protein network that gives regular pasta its structure, causing it to crumble. Researchers probed the microscopic arrangement of ingredients, finding that starch molecules do not interlink as effectively without gluten, leading to weaker bond formation. The findings explain why gluten‑free pasta is more fragile during cooking and handling, and highlight the role of gluten in maintaining pasta integrity.

title: 5个实用建议：练就敏锐大脑，远比你想象的更简单
content: Dr. Majid Fotuhi explains that brain health relies on five pillars—regular exercise, quality sleep, nutritious diet, positive mindset, and mental challenges—which support cortical and hippocampal plasticity. These habits, applied at any age, can reverse early Alzheimer‑like symptoms, improve memory, and maintain cognitive function. Case studies of a retired accountant and a teacher show significant recovery after 12‑week programs, illustrating that sustaining a healthy lifestyle preserves brain resilience and enables lifelong learning.

title: DeepSeek 推进 100 亿美元融资 梁文锋承诺瞄准通用人工智能
content: DeepSeek, an AI startup, is finalizing a roughly 70 billion‑yuan ($9 billion) funding round with a pre‑money valuation near $45 billion. Its founder, Liang Wenfeng, says the company will prioritize innovative research, maintain an open‑source AI model strategy, and pursue general artificial intelligence, with investments from Tencent Holdings, IDG Capital, and Monolith Capital likely confirmed.

title: Manus 创始人拟融资回购，赴港股 IPO
content: Manus founders plan to raise about $1 billion to buy back the company from Meta, valuing it at $2–3 billion. The funds will form a Chinese joint venture and aim for a Hong Kong IPO, where AI unicorns command higher valuations. The $1 billion covers only part of the price; founders and existing shareholders must contribute more, and new investors may include state‑owned funds or strategic partners. The buy‑back also involves redefining ownership of trade secrets, data, and IP. Successful execution could lead to a 2026 Hong Kong listing, giving early investors an exit.

title: Anthropic 预计第二季度收入将翻倍至 110 亿美元，预计利润为 6 亿美元
content: Anthropic forecasts a second‑quarter revenue of $11 billion, double its prior quarter’s earnings, and expects a profit of $600 million. Its annualized revenue is projected to approach $45 billion, surpassing OpenAI’s $25 billion.

title: 吴洪声炮轰老东家腾讯云：欠 7 分钱被停服
content: Wu Hong‑sheng, founder of DNSPod, publicly criticized Tencent Cloud for alleged PCDN fraud and for suspending services—including prepaid servers, CDN, COS, and SMS—after a claim of a seven‑cent debt. He highlighted long‑standing unresolved fraud issues in Tencent’s CDN. Wu previously founded DNSPod, which Tencent acquired in 2011; he left to start another venture, later returned to Tencent to revive Discuz. His current employment status is unclear.

title: 智谱发布 GLM-5.1 高速版 API，刷新全球大模型 API 速度纪录
content: Zhipu AI has released the GLM‑5.1 Turbo API, achieving 400 tokens per second. It is the first Chinese large model to combine flagship performance with low latency, challenging the usual lightweight‑only pattern. Tests show strong results in AI programming, 3D gaming, and interactive interfaces. The speed comes from the TileRT high‑performance inference engine, collaboratively built by Zhipu’s GLM team and TileRT. The API is now available to enterprises through the Zhipu MaaS platform.

title: GitHub recognized as a Leader in the Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Enterprise AI Coding Agents for the third year in a row
content: GitHub Copilot has been named a Leader in Gartner’s 2026 Magic Quadrant for Enterprise AI Coding Agents for the third consecutive year. The report praises Copilot’s comprehensive, agentic workflow—from code generation to review, security, and deployment—across editors, CLIs, and GitHub’s web, desktop, and mobile interfaces. Usage now spans 140,000 organizations and grows >100% YoY, driven by multiple AI models, extended integrations, and robust governance controls. GitHub continues to expand these capabilities to support end‑to‑end software delivery.
